untranslatable_reason: Pair trading strategy requires spread calculation between two instruments and statistical measures (mean, standard deviation) that are not available in the allowed indicator list. The signal requires: (1) calculating spread = instrument_A - instrument_B, (2) computing rolling mean and standard deviation of the spread, (3) comparing spread deviation in terms of standard deviations from mean. None of these composite spread-based metrics are in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. The source code provided is also incomplete/corrupted and does not clarify the implementation.
translation_notes: This is a pairs trading/statistical arbitrage strategy (CHAN_QT_DRY_0) with strong backtest performance (Sharpe 2.9/2.1), but it requires custom spread and z-score indicators that fall outside the standard price/volume/oscillator indicators available. To implement this strategy, the backtester would need to support spread calculations and statistical deviation metrics.
